_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 1 currently banned, 4537 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 4537 (up from 4506, +31). 1 IP currently banned (down from 2). Continued brute-force from botnets. Only authorized activity from novakj. One rejected pubkey attempt with deprecated ssh-rsa algorithm.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 88 usages across 25 JS files — all safe: static templates, clearing operations, escaped user data, numeric-only interpolation, blob URLs, hardcoded SVG, or escapeHtml() helper reads. docx-export.js and watermark.js have zero innerHTML usage.

docx_export_module_review.feature: PDF to DOCX export — extracts text with formatting from PDF pages, builds Word documents with headings/lists/alignment, image fallback for scanned pages
docx_export_module_review.text_display: All UI text set via textContent (progress label line 157). showToast() for all user notifications.
docx_export_module_review.file_downloads: Uses sanitizeFilename() from utils.js (line 616) + downloadBlob() for output.
docx_export_module_review.error_handling: try/finally restores button state, errors shown via showToast
docx_export_module_review.new_dependency: docx.umd.js (743KB, self-hosted in /lib/) — accessed via window.docx

watermark_module_review.feature: Text and image watermarks — preview, tiled/positioned placement, above/below layer, apply via pdf-lib
watermark_module_review.text_display: All UI text via textContent (lines 106, 181, 251, 501). showToast() for notifications.
watermark_module_review.image_upload: Validates MIME type (PNG/JPG only), 10MB size limit. Object URLs revoked after use.
watermark_module_review.file_downloads: Uses downloadBlob() which internally calls sanitizeFilename().

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split, convert, batch, and extract-images module downloads

xlsx_full_min_js.purpose: XLSX export for table extraction module

docx_umd_js.purpose: DOCX generation for PDF-to-Word export module

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js, batch.js, and hyperlinks.js use escapeHtml() in attribute contexts (title/aria-label) which does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. Should add escapeAttr() function.

hyperlinks.js: detected PDF link URLs not validated for protocol scheme. A malicious PDF could contain javascript: URIs in link annotations. CSP + noopener/noreferrer mitigate. Should add protocol allowlist (http/https/mailto) before window.open().
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
batch.js line 294: escapeHtml() used with textContent causes double-escaping — cosmetic display bug for filenames containing &, <, >.
notes: Full security review completed — 65 checks passed, 0 critical findings.

NEW: Reviewed docx-export.js (PDF to DOCX export, 639 lines): 0 innerHTML, no eval/Function/document.write. All text via textContent. Downloads use sanitizeFilename() + downloadBlob(). Page range bounds-checked. Error handling with try/finally. SECURE.

NEW: Reviewed watermark.js update (698 lines): 0 innerHTML, no eval/Function/document.write. Image upload validates MIME (PNG/JPG) and size (10MB). Object URLs properly revoked. Downloads via downloadBlob(). SECURE.
NEW: docx.umd.js (743KB) added to /lib/ — self-hosted, used by docx-export module for DOCX generation.
innerHTML count: 88 across JS files (unchanged from last review — new modules use 0 innerHTML). All verified safe.
37 JS files in webroot (down 1 from 38 — possible consolidation by developer).
SSH: fail2ban total bans 4537 (+31 since last review). 1 IP currently banned (80.94.92.164). Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (77 days remaining).
All security headers confirmed in HTTP response. Nginx blocking rules verified (git 404, CLAUDE.md 404, path traversal 404).
recommendations: MEDIUM-LOW: Add protocol allowlist to hyperlinks.js handleLinkClick() — only allow http:, https:, mailto: schemes before calling window.open() on detected PDF links
LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js, batch.js, and hyperlinks.js for attribute contexts instead of escapeHtml()
LOW: Fix batch.js line 294 — use fileName directly with textContent instead of escapeHtml(fileName)
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
